scripts.app:dev: concurrently -k -n 'API,APP,ALERTS-TASK,COMMON-UTILS' -c 'green.bold,blue.bold,yellow.bold,magenta' 'nx run @hyperdx/api:dev 2>&1 | tee ${HDX_DEV_LOGS_DIR:+"$HDX_DEV_LOGS_DIR/api.log"}' 'nx run @hyperdx/app:dev 2>&1 | tee ${HDX_DEV_LOGS_DIR:+"$HDX_DEV_LOGS_DIR/app.log"}' 'nx run @hyperdx/api:dev-task check-alerts 2>&1 | tee ${HDX_DEV_LOGS_DIR:+"$HDX_DEV_LOGS_DIR/alerts.log"}' 'nx run @hyperdx/common-utils:dev 2>&1 | tee ${HDX_DEV_LOGS_DIR:+"$HDX_DEV_LOGS_DIR/common-utils.log"}'
scripts.app:dev:local: sh -c '. ./scripts/dev-env.sh && yarn build:common-utils && concurrently -k -n "APP,COMMON-UTILS" -c "blue.bold,magenta" "nx run @hyperdx/app:dev:local 2>&1 | tee ${HDX_DEV_LOGS_DIR:+\"$HDX_DEV_LOGS_DIR/app.log\"}" "nx run @hyperdx/common-utils:dev 2>&1 | tee ${HDX_DEV_LOGS_DIR:+\"$HDX_DEV_LOGS_DIR/common-utils.log\"}"'
scripts.dev: sh -c '. ./scripts/dev-env.sh && yarn build:common-utils && dotenvx run --convention=nextjs -- docker compose -p "$HDX_DEV_PROJECT" -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && yarn app:dev; dotenvx run --convention=nextjs -- docker compose -p "$HDX_DEV_PROJECT" -f docker-compose.dev.yml down'
scripts.dev:down: sh -c '. ./scripts/dev-env.sh && docker compose -p "$HDX_DEV_PROJECT" -f docker-compose.dev.yml down && sh ./scripts/dev-kill-ports.sh'
scripts.release: npx changeset tag && npx changeset publish

packages/api/src/routers/external-api/**: sh -c 'cd packages/api && yarn run lint:openapi && git add openapi.json'
